history.content:
<thought>
I can see the goal G to the right of my current position, but the cell directly to the right appears to be lava L. To avoid stepping into lava, I will turn left to explore a safe route around the lava while keeping the goal in view.

<action>

</action>

<thought>
I see my current position '^' at the bottom row of the visible area, facing upward by default. Directly in front of me is a wall '#', so moving forward isn’t possible. I also see a lava 'L' to my left in the view, so I should avoid turning toward it. I will turn right to face the open floor '.' and move toward the safer space.
</thought>
<action>

</action>

<thought>

</thought>
<action>

</thought>

I can see the goal G ahead of me to the right, but the cell directly in front of me is lava (L) which I must avoid. I will turn right to align toward the safe path around the lava toward G.

<thought>

<thought>

<action>

</action>
